name: uderia-sharepoint
description: Microsoft SharePoint and OneDrive integration. Provides list_sites, list_libraries, list_files, read_file, upload_file, and search_files tools. Requires user Microsoft account connection.

tool_schemas.name: list_sites
tool_schemas.description: List SharePoint sites the user has access to.

tool_schemas.name: list_libraries
tool_schemas.description: List document libraries (drives) in a SharePoint site.

tool_schemas.name: list_files
tool_schemas.description: List files and folders in a SharePoint document library or subfolder.

arguments.name: folder_path
arguments.description: Folder path relative to library root (default: '/').

tool_schemas.name: read_file
tool_schemas.description: Get file metadata and content for text files up to 4 MB.

tool_schemas.name: upload_file
tool_schemas.description: Create or update a text file in a SharePoint document library.

tool_schemas.name: search_files
tool_schemas.description: Search across all SharePoint sites and OneDrive for files matching a query.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query (file name, content keywords, etc.).

AZURE_CLIENT_ID.label: Azure App (Client) ID
AZURE_CLIENT_ID.description: Application (client) ID from your Azure App Registration (Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Overview).

AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.label: Azure Client Secret
AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client secret from Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Certificates & secrets.

AZURE_TENANT_ID.label: Azure Tenant ID (optional)
AZURE_TENANT_ID.description: Azure AD tenant ID to restrict to a single organisation. Leave empty to allow any Microsoft account.

auth_schema.description: Connect your Microsoft account to enable SharePoint and OneDrive tools.
